title: Ping Overlay
description: Displays your current ping and FPS on the right from your hotbar.
body:
Displays your current ping and FPS on the right from your hotbar.
![Ping/FPS display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/078f9f1757b5db8b93f09ecea4822dbdfe0cd033.png)
Client-side only. Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API and Java 21+ (obviously).

Notes:
* May conflict with other HUD/GUI mods that render near the right of the hotbar
* Ping updates may be sluggish on some servers that ratelimit such information
